Off Calendar Jun-09-2008 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-10-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURSDAY, APR-10-2008: JEANNINE CLARK APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE THIS DAY BY OR FOR TANYA MURILLO. THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO JEANNINE CLARK.

THE COURT TAKES THE BENCH AND CALLS THE MATTER.

THE COURT HEARS ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY JEANNINE CLARK AND REVIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IN THE MATTER. THEREUPON, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. JEANNINE CLARK IS NOTIFIED SHE WILL BE NOTIFIED OF THE COURT'S DECISION VIA U.S. MAIL.

PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID H. S. COMMINS; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525).
